title: Transactional email notifications (Mailgun)
description: Order confirmation, payment received, order shipped (with tracking), welcome, and password reset emails sent via Mailgun.

inScope: Order shipped email with tracking number

acceptanceCriteria.text: Customer receives an order confirmation email after checkout completes
Customer receives a payment-received email when payment is confirmed
Customer receives a shipped email containing the tracking number when status moves to shipped
New registrants receive a welcome email
Password reset emails are sent via Mailgun (delivery already covered by F-004's OTP send)
